title: Recommendation: keep summarized traces inside the cost guardrail
summary: Keep trace depth where it helps reviewers verify failed claims, but summarize traces at claim level and cap retries so the run stays under the 1.15x cost guardrail.

claims.text: The candidate's extra token cost is currently inside the approved 1.15x guardrail.
Trace retention is useful only when summarized near the failed claim.
The product UX should keep single briefings under 10 seconds while lab runs show progress and artifact paths.

openQuestions: Which trace fields should be summarized next to evaluator failures?
What retry cap keeps the candidate below the finance threshold on larger batches?
recommendation: Retain claim-level trace summaries, cap retries, and shrink the batch if cost rises above 1.15x.
